title: Magic Window Groove Cleaning Brush, New Window Groove Cleaning Brush Tools Set, Groove Cleanin Brush Window or Sliding Door for Sliding Door, Sill, Tile Lines, Shutter (Green)
features: 【Multifunctional Cleaning Brush】This tool is designed to clean narrow and hard-to-reach areas such as window tracks and slides, gaps in window frames, joints between tiles, gaps between blinds, and car vents. It can reach deep into these tiny corners to remove accumulated dust, dirt and debris, providing a more thorough cleaning effect

【Durable and Efficient Material】Crafted from premium ABS with an anti-slip handle and a high-quality scouring sponge, this magic window groove cleaning brush is built for durability and ease of use. The sponge is removable and washable, making it simple to maintain cleaning power while effectively reaching door and window slides, gaps, and other challenging areas

【Handheld Design】The brush adopts an ergonomic handle design, which is comfortable to hold and conforms to the natural curvature of the hand, and is not easy to get tired after long-term use. Its non-slip handle ensures stable operation and makes it easier to use

【Efficient Window Track Cleaning】Experience effortless cleaning with tools specifically designed to reach deep into window tracks and grooves. Our brush set removes dirt and debris with minimal effort, keeping your windows spotless and functioning smoothly while saving you valuable time and effort

【Wide Range of Applications】This cleaning tool is not only designed for window cleaning, but can also easily handle a variety of hard-to-clean areas in the home. Whether it is stubborn dirt in the joints of tiles, dust accumulation between blinds, or dust and debris in the tracks of sliding doors, it can clean them quickly and efficiently
